items.original_title: bug(api): Fast simulation does not support labware calibration
items.original_body:
# Overview
Labware calibration uses `ProtocolContext.temp_connect` to attach a real hardware controller to simulating context.

`InstrumentContextSimulation` does not support this behavior .

# Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] labware calibration can be performed when protocol is run using `ProtocolContextSimulation`

items.original_title: [JSSCP] HTN Issues - Blocker for go live
items.original_body:
- [x] Epilepsy and Diabetes have same colour. that should be changed.
- [x] Spelling Mistake : Baseline ser creatinin, I think it should be Baseline serum creatinine
- [x] HTN Enrolment : when entering medicine it even allows entering 10 times per day. we should either keep this as coded or keep absolute low and high range. 
- [x] HTN Enrolment : The Counselling points be shown first and then the question should be asked "Initial counselling done"? To be done everywhere
- [ ] HTN Follow up : Do we have sample forms filled? I am wondering if the users will be able to fill in text box of new complaints. i think it should be coded answer. 
- [ ] HTN Follow up: The question says No. of days Medicine taken previous month. what if the patient was previously seen in less than 1 months?
- [ ] Translations missing at multiple places. please check the app thoroughly and get the missing translations from Ravi

To be done everywhere - [ ] HTN Follow up : Do we have sample forms filled? items.original_body:
"Whenever the value of RD is calculated greater than 350, then it must be set to 350 (RD = 350)"

I cannot see a mention of 350 being restricted in the code?

ref: https://www.englishchess.org.uk/wp-content/uploads/2012/04/The_Glicko_system_for_beginners1.pdf

items.original_body:
```
$ docker run --rm -v $(pwd):/go/src/github.com/gravitational/teleport -w /go/src/github.com/gravitational/teleport golangci/golangci-lint:v1.38.0 /bin/bash -c "cd api && golangci-lint run -c ../.golangci.yml ./..."
client/client.go:89:40: `guarentee` is a misspelling of `guarantee` (misspell)
// direct access to server values that guarentee a successful connection.
 ^
client/client.go:263:67: `propogate` is a misspelling of `propagate` (misspell)
 // Some credentials don't require these fields. If no errors propogate, then they need to provide these fields.
 ^
client/credentials_test.go:162:43: unnecessary conversion (unconvert)
 err = ioutil.WriteFile(tlsCasPath, []byte(tlsCACert), 0600)
 ^
client/credentials_test.go:165:44: unnecessary conversion (unconvert)
 err = ioutil.WriteFile(sshCertPath, []byte(sshCert), 0600)
 ^
client/credentials_test.go:168:43: unnecessary conversion (unconvert)
 err = ioutil.WriteFile(sshCasPath, []byte(sshCACert), 0600)
 ^
client/credentials_test.go:156:40: unnecessary conversion (unconvert)
 err = ioutil.WriteFile(keyPath, []byte(keyPEM), 0600)
 ^
client/credentials_test.go:159:44: unnecessary conversion (unconvert)
 err = ioutil.WriteFile(tlsCertPath, []byte(tlsCert), 0600)
 ^
types/access_request.go:231:27: func `(*AccessRequestV3).getThreshold` is unused (unused)
func (r *AccessRequestV3) getThreshold(tid uint32) (AccessReviewThreshold, error) {
 ^
```

It seems that because `api` isn't technically part of the `teleport` package any more, `golangci-lint` won't lint it:

```
$ go list ./api/...
pattern ./api/...: main module (github.com/gravitational/teleport) does not contain package github.com/gravitational/teleport/api/client

$ docker run --rm -v $(pwd):/go/src/github.com/gravitational/teleport -w /go/src/github.com/gravitational/teleport golangci/golangci-lint:v1.38.0 /bin/bash -c "golangci-lint run -c .golangci.yml ./api/..." 
level=error msg="Running error: context loading failed: no go files to analyze"
```

We should probably add a separate `lint-api` make target which lints the `api` package separately using the same rules, and run that as part of `make lint`.

```
$ docker run --rm -v $(pwd):/go/src/github.com/gravitational/teleport -w /go/src/github.com/gravitational/teleport golangci/golangci-lint:v1.38.0 /bin/bash -c "cd api && golangci-lint run -c ../.golangci.yml ./..."
client/client.go:89:40: `guarentee` is a misspelling of `guarantee` (misspell)
// direct access to server values that guarentee a successful connection.
 ^

 ^
client/credentials_test.go:162:43: unnecessary conversion (unconvert)

 ^
client/credentials_test.go:165:44: unnecessary conversion (unconvert)
 err = ioutil.WriteFile(sshCertPath, []byte(sshCert), 0600)
 ^
client/credentials_test.go:168:43: unnecessary conversion (unconvert)

 ^

 err = ioutil.WriteFile(tlsCertPath, []byte(tlsCert), 0600)

types/access_request.go:231:27: func `(*AccessRequestV3).getThreshold` is unused (unused)
func (r *AccessRequestV3) getThreshold(tid uint32) (AccessReviewThreshold, error) {
 ^
```

It seems that because `api` isn't technically part of the `teleport` package any more, `golangci-lint` won't lint it:

```
$ go list ./api/...
pattern ./api/...: main module (github.com/gravitational/teleport) does not contain package github.com/gravitational/teleport/api/client

$ docker run --rm -v $(pwd):/go/src/github.com/gravitational/teleport -w /go/src/github.com/gravitational/teleport golangci/golangci-lint:v1.38.0 /bin/bash -c "golangci-lint run -c .golangci.yml ./api/..." 
level=error msg="Running error: context loading failed: no go files to analyze"
```

We should probably add a separate `lint-api` make target which lints the `api` package separately using the same rules, and run that as part of `make lint`.

items.original_title: CLI crashes when the config file is missing
items.original_body: Running the command without a config file raises an uncaught exception instead of showing a helpful error.
items.mutated_title: How do I install the CLI on Windows?
